run_metadata.notes: No audits/artifacts build_output or bundle_stats; findings are code-review and inference unless noted.

agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Finds performance bottlenecks, unnecessary costs, inefficient queries, bundle/render waste, and metered API usage patterns.
stop_conditions_hit: No preflight bundle_stats or Lighthouse output available; bundle and Core Web Vitals findings are inference-only.

coverage.incomplete_reason: Did not exhaust every API route or static asset; focused on hot paths (projects API, worker job loop, LLM calls, orchestration fetches).

findings.title: One OpenAI chat completion per app in a single audit job multiplies token cost
findings.description: processJob iterates resolveApps() and calls auditWithLlm once per app with full expectations + gatherCodeContext per iteration. A job that audits N apps issues N separate chat.completions requests with max_tokens 4096 each, scaling cost linearly with app count.

proof_hooks.summary: Sequential per-app LLM calls inside processJob loop
Each audit uses max_tokens 4096 and large user payload

findings.impact: Portfolio-wide or multi-app jobs can produce 3–10× API spend versus batched or single-pass strategies; also increases wall-clock time.

suggested_fix.approach: Batch apps into fewer calls (single prompt with section per app), cap apps per job, or use cheaper model for first pass with escalation.
suggested_fix.risk_notes: Merged prompts may hit context limits; need chunking strategy.
tests_needed: Integration test with 2+ apps asserting call count or mock fetch assertions

findings.title: GET /api/projects returns every finding for every project with no pagination
findings.description: The portfolio page loads the full project list via repo.list(), serializing entire findings arrays for all projects on initial paint. Large portfolios mean large JSON over the wire and heavy client parse/render work.

proof_hooks.summary: API returns full project array from list()
Client fetches all projects on mount with no pagination

findings.impact: Slow TTI and memory use on dashboards with many projects or thousands of findings; repeated full refetches after mutations.

suggested_fix.approach: Add summary endpoint (counts, blockers only) for grid; lazy-load full findings per project on drill-in.
suggested_fix.risk_notes: Requires repository interface changes for listSummaries vs listFull.
tests_needed: API contract test for summary shape

findings.title: synthesize_project loads full project_json for all rows
findings.description: listAllProjects runs SELECT project_json FROM lyra_projects with no LIMIT, parsing every project's full findings into memory. Only titles/severities are needed for the synthesis blob (and even that is capped to 200 lines after fetch).

proof_hooks.summary: Unbounded SELECT of all project JSON
Worker then slices to 200 lines after loading all findings
proof_hooks.expected_schema: SQL or RPC returning only finding_id, title, severity per project
proof_hooks.observed_schema: Full project_json blobs for N projects loaded into Node

findings.impact: DB memory/IO and Node heap spike as portfolio grows; wasted network from DB to worker.

suggested_fix.approach: Store denormalized finding summaries table or use JSONB path query / SQL to extract only needed fields with LIMIT per project.
suggested_fix.risk_notes: May need migration for summary columns.
tests_needed: Job with 2 projects verifies query uses projection or limit

findings.title: Worker polls lyra_audit_jobs on an interval when Redis is unset
findings.description: Without REDIS_URL, setInterval(poll, pollMs default 8000) issues SELECT ... WHERE status = queued repeatedly, creating steady DB QPS per worker instance.
findings.impact: Low per-query cost but continuous load; multiple workers multiply queries.

suggested_fix.approach: Document Redis for production; optionally use LISTEN/NOTIFY or longer idle backoff when queue empty.

findings.title: bullmq and ioredis in Next server dependencies may inflate serverless bundle
findings.description: dashboard depends on bullmq; orchestration jobs route imports Queue from bullmq. Serverless/edge deployments trace this into the API bundle, increasing cold start and deploy size relative to a thin HTTP enqueue to external Redis.

proof_hooks.summary: bullmq Queue used in API route

findings.impact: Larger Next server traces and slower cold starts on platforms that bundle API routes.

suggested_fix.approach: Measure next build trace; if large, move enqueue to worker-only or use minimal redis client.

findings.title: OrchestrationPanel issues three parallel fetches on every mount without cache or stale-while-revalidate
findings.description: load() hits /api/orchestration, /api/orchestration/jobs, /api/durable-state together on each panel mount. No SWR/React Query dedupe across navigations; user switching views may refetch identical data.

proof_hooks.summary: Promise.all of three internal APIs on load

findings.impact: Extra server load and latency when revisiting portfolio; minor compared to full-project payload issue.

suggested_fix.approach: Add SWR with dedupingInterval or lift orchestration state to a parent provider.

findings.title: Confirm index on lyra_audit_jobs (status, created_at) for worker poll query
findings.description: Poll uses WHERE status = 'queued' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1. Without a supporting index this may degrade to sequential scan as job history grows. Schema not verified in-repo.

proof_hooks.query_text: SELECT id FROM lyra_audit_jobs WHERE status = 'queued' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1

proof_hooks.summary: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on production-like data volume
proof_hooks.command: EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) SELECT id FROM lyra_audit_jobs WHERE status = 'queued' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1;
proof_hooks.expected: Index Scan using partial or composite index on (status, created_at)
proof_hooks.actual: Unknown until run against populated DB

findings.impact: Possible latency spikes and CPU on large lyra_audit_jobs tables.

suggested_fix.approach: If Seq Scan, add CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY ... ON lyra_audit_jobs (created_at) WHERE status = 'queued';

next_actions.action: Design summary API or lazy-load for portfolio list to shrink GET /api/projects payload
next_actions.rationale: Largest user-visible latency and bandwidth win for growing data.

next_actions.action: Reduce OpenAI calls per job (batch apps or tiered models)
Replace listAllProjects full scan with projection or summary query for synthesize_project
next_actions.rationale: Lowers DB and worker memory for synthesis jobs.

next_actions.action: Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on queued-job poll; add partial index if needed
next_actions.rationale: Cheap validation prevents future scan regressions.

next_actions.action: Capture next build analyzer output and decide if bullmq should leave dashboard bundle
next_actions.rationale: Confirms or dismisses serverless bundle concern with evidence.
